titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bishr Al-Nabbal
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bishr Al-Nabbal

segments: ه عن بشير النبّال فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بشير النبّال‌.
arabic.text: ه عن بشير النبّال فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بشير النبّال‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Bishr Al-Nabbal has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Attar, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bishr Al-Nabbal.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Bishr Al-Nabbal has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Attar, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bishr Al-Nabbal.
